route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from gold_lakes_itineraries.geojson. Export to GPX before navigation use. Local BRouter/OSM draft from named Gold Lakes stops.
route.description: California planning-grade Sierra City / Gold Lakes tighter three-day BRouter itinerary. It reduces the basecamp route to a 43.3-mile draft around Gold Lake, Packer Lake, Upper Sardine, and Sierra City, but still needs official access, camp, water, fire/smoke/weather, and export QA.
route.surfaceMix: Shorter draft but still includes mixed mountain road/trail surfaces.
